name: cp-vibe-code
description: Full-stack web application with Next.js 15 and Bun backend

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && bun run dev" "cd frontend && bun run dev"
scripts.build: bun run build:shared && bun run build:backend && bun run build:frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && bun run start" "cd frontend && bun run start"
scripts.lint: bun run lint:frontend && bun run lint:backend
scripts.type-check: bun run type-check:frontend && bun run type-check:backend && bun run type-check:shared
scripts.install:all: bun install && cd backend && bun install && cd ../frontend && bun install && cd ../shared && bun install
